commands: echo '=== Push existing backup files to S3 from host ==='
echo '=== Test boto3/S3 access from inside backend container ==='

docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 python3 -c "import boto3; s3=boto3.client('s3',region_name='us-east-1'); r=s3.list_objects_v2(Bucket='erpnext-poc-erpnextbucket-780m8mqa8l0v',MaxKeys=5); print('S3 accessible, object count:', r.get('KeyCount',0))" 2>&1 || echo 'S3 access test failed'
echo '=== Configure automated scheduled backup to push to S3 via host cron ==='

echo '0 2 * * * root aws s3 sync /var/lib/docker/volumes/frappe_docker_sites/_data/frontend/private/backups/ s3://erpnext-poc-erpnextbucket-780m8mqa8l0v/backups/frontend/ --region us-east-1 --delete' > /etc/cron.d/erpnext-s3-backup
echo 'Cron job created for nightly S3 backup sync at 2am UTC'
echo '=== List S3 bucket after push ==='
